findings.description: Section s1 references `n:param` explicitly in the listSearchParams.tag description ("初回検索条件を保持する `<n:param>` タグを出力") and `n:listSearchSubmit` appears in the JSP code example, but neither custom tag is listed in the hints for s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source table: "初回検索時点の検索条件を保持する **<n:param>** タグを出力する"; Source code: "<n:listSearchSubmit tag=\"submit\" type=\"button\" ..."
